$comment: Curated bug patterns the injector applies to src/math.js. Each pattern is a deterministic find-and-replace plus a human-readable signature. Patterns are chosen to be (a) simple enough that ai-ci-fixer should solve them in one shot, (b) varied enough that the trainer flywheel sees real diversity, and (c) caught by the existing tests in tests/math.test.js.

patterns.summary: add() returns a - b instead of a + b
subtract() returns a + b instead of a - b
clamp() returns min and max swapped
clamp() < changed to <= (silently incorrect on the boundary)
uniqueSorted() loses the .sort() so order is insertion-order, not ascending
uniqueSorted() uses default lexicographic sort instead of numeric ascending
